original: Pond looks stricken, but he nods. "Yes, I... I'll do that. Menes. He is a kind man."

option_line: bffi_ulmusTalkNoSedgeOut2menes:"Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will."
original: Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will.
Pond looks stricken, but he nods. "Yes, I... I'll do that. Menes will understand why I had to do... what I had to do."

option_line: bffi_ulmusTalkNoSedgeOut2menes:"Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will."

Pond looks stricken, but he nods. "Yes." Another cough. "Menes, kind."

Pond looks stricken, but he nods. "Yes. Menes." Another cough. "Will understand."

option_line: bffi_ulmusTalkNoSedgeOut2menes:"Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will."
original: Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will.

Bornanew looks at you, then to Pond. His expression softens, just a little.

"Captain," he says. "They will kill him for his failure. And not well. Let me turn him over to the Knights. They will offer him a path to redemption, harsh though it may be."

option_line: bffi_pondNoSedgeOutro2knights:"As you like, $global.jethroName. Pond is your responsibility."
original: As you like, $global.jethroName. Pond is your responsibility.
